TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit ArmArtifactSigningModelFactory extends System.Object

Docs.summary: A factory class for creating instances of the models for mocking.

Docs.param: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}.
The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts".
Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.
The geo-location where the resource lives.
The URI of the artifact signing account which is used during signing files.
Status of the current operation on artifact signing account.

Docs.summary: The parameters used to check the availability of the artifact signing account name.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.ResourceManager.ArtifactSigning.Models.ArtifactSigningAccountNameAvailabilityResult ArtifactSigningAccountNameAvailabilityResult (bool? isNameAvailable = default, Azure.ResourceManager.ArtifactSigning.Models.ArtifactSigningAccountNameUnavailabilityReason? reason = default, string message = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.ResourceManager.ArtifactSigning.Models.ArtifactSigningAccountNameAvailabilityResult ArtifactSigningAccountNameAvailabilityResult(valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> isNameAvailable, valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.ArtifactSigning.Models.ArtifactSigningAccountNameUnavailabilityReason> reason, string message) cil managed

Public Shared Function ArtifactSigningAccountNameAvailabilityResult (Optional isNameAvailable As Nullable(Of Boolean) = Nothing, Optional reason As Nullable(Of ArtifactSigningAccountNameUnavailabilityReason) = Nothing, Optional message As String = Nothing) As ArtifactSigningAccountNameAvailabilityResult

static member ArtifactSigningAccountNameAvailabilityResult : Nullable<bool> * Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.ArtifactSigning.Models.ArtifactSigningAccountNameUnavailabilityReason> * string -> Azure.ResourceManager.ArtifactSigning.Models.ArtifactSigningAccountNameAvailabilityResult

Docs.param: A boolean value that indicates whether the name is available for you to use. If true, the name is available. If false, the name has already been taken or is invalid and cannot be used.
The reason that an artifact signing account name could not be used. The Reason element is only returned if nameAvailable is false.
An error message explaining the Reason value in more detail.

MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.ResourceManager.ArtifactSigning.Models.ArmArtifactSigningModelFactory.ArtifactSigningCertificateProfileData (id, name, resourceType, systemData, profileType, includeStreetAddress, includeCity, includeState, includeCountry, includePostalCode, identityValidationId, provisioningState, status, certificates)

Docs.param: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}.
The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts".
Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.
Whether to include STREET in the certificate subject name.
Whether to include L in the certificate subject name. Applicable only for private trust, private trust ci profile types.
Whether to include S in the certificate subject name. Applicable only for private trust, private trust ci profile types.
Whether to include C in the certificate subject name. Applicable only for private trust, private trust ci profile types.
Whether to include PC in the certificate subject name.
Identity validation id used for the certificate subject name.
Status of the current operation on certificate profile.
